GenAiPlugin.description: Coordinates delivery notification and install scheduling for VDD tracking devices. Retrieves delivery details, sends SMS to customer for install date preferences, and creates work orders for the installer.

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
Route to this topic when a customer responds with their preferred installation dates after receiving a VDD delivery notification SMS.
Step 1: Use Get Delivery Details to retrieve the asset, customer contact, device serial/ESN, vehicle, account, and delivery address.
Step 2: The customer will reply with 3 preferred installation dates and times of day. Extract exactly 3 dates in YYYY-MM-DD format and 3 time-of-day values (Morning, Afternoon, or Evening) from their message. Use Collect Install Dates to log these preferences. Pass the contactId, assetId, customerName, serialNumber, and all 6 date/time values (preferredDate1, preferredTime1, preferredDate2, preferredTime2, preferredDate3, preferredTime3). The function outputs pass through the preferences for the next step.
Step 3: Use Create Installer Work Order with the device details from Step 1 and the 6 date/time preferences from Step 2 outputs. This creates a high-priority Work Order with custom date preference fields and a linked Service Appointment scheduled to the first preferred slot. Pass: assetId, accountId, serialNumber, deviceESN, vehicleName, customerName, customerPhone, deliveryAddress, and all 6 preference values from the Collect Install Dates outputs.
Always execute all 3 steps in sequence. Confirm the work order number and service appointment to the customer when complete.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Can retrieve delivery details, collect 3 preferred installation date/time preferences from the customer, create installer work orders with those preferences in custom fields, and create linked service appointments. Cannot modify device configuration or change asset status.
